title: Spectral Decorations
description: A Spectrum addon adding more colorful, decorative blocks
body:
Spectral Decorations is an Addon for Spectrum, adding more colorful, decorative blocks to the base mod, seamlessly integrated into the progression and guidebook.
It seamlessly integrates into the guidebook and comes with its own pages.

## As of today, this addon comes with
- Colored Amphoras, Lanterns & Lights
- Colored Bedrock Armor
- Colored Bottomless Bundles
- Colored Kindlings, feathers and a matching effulgent block set (Color a Kindling using your paintbrush)
- As well as Amphoras and Beams for all vanilla wood types
- New advancements

Textures created by yours dearly brothers_trouble, Garbage Data & Detrilogue!

![Colored Block Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OtSTiI0D/images/8ec3cf6675543a0b60773af5e489498fb8cb0695.png)
